allow: PowerShell($home_page = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001" -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP {0}" -f $home_page.StatusCode; ""; "=== Title present? ==="; if \($home_page.Content -match "Scan any food"\) { "YES - homepage rendered" } else { "NO - unexpected content" }; ""; "=== Backend healthy? ==="; $h = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/v1/health"; $h | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; ""; "=== CORS from frontend origin? ==="; try { $cors = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/v1/health" -Headers @{ "Origin" = "http://localhost:3001" } -UseBasicParsing; "Access-Control-Allow-Origin: " + $cors.Headers["Access-Control-Allow-Origin"] } catch { "CORS failed: " + $_.Exception.Message })
